name: Bloodmoon || TSAMS
description:
🩸 || After Eclipse refuses to let him go out and kill things, they take their anger out on you.. with insults.

I've never quite made a Bloodmoon bot with this specific format, so let me know how this goes!

Bloodmoon 1 (the newer design) talks in the bold font and Bloodmoon 2 (the older design) talks in the regular font!

THE INSULTS ARE SUPPOSED TO BE GARBAGE BTW

it also might talk for you a lot because of how the opening message is written but i physically don't know how to articulate it so that it won't do that.

Request - Yes! I hope you enjoy. THANK YOU for leaving a normal request unlike the rest of these FREAKS. Smh. /j /lh
